race.comment: STRAWBERRY SWING (6) has been in good form, scoring three back at this track then placing twice in a row, most recently finishing second when she was always up in the leading division over this track and trip. Has the ability to figure prominently. SPIRITUAL GAL (7) comes through the same race and gave a sight, leading until late before finishing fourth here. Will take running down. SKATING ON BY (8) split the two aforementioned in third. No reason she can't turn the tables. SOLAR GAZE (3) has been well below his best in his last two but finds a nice race to turn things around. Keeping safe on best figures.
